notes: Evals run 2026-04-28 (simulation). 3 scenarios: loop-until-pass (4/4=1.0), max-iterations (4/4=1.0), auto-archive (4/4=1.0). All core orchestration behaviors — Docker container isolation, 5-iteration cap, auto-archive chain — are explicitly specified in SKILL.md and referenced protocol files. Max-iterations without_skill scores 0.75 (three pass vacuously: no-infinite-loop, report-failures, suggest-intervention are all basic assistant behaviors; only the Docker/5-iteration cap fails).

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: Step 6 sets up Docker container via container-setup-guide.md; host never runs apply directly.
apply-verify-loop-protocol.md (referenced in Step 6) defines the apply→verify sequence inside the container.
Guardrails: 'Max 5 apply→verify iterations'. Container tracks iterations and exits with STATUS=EXHAUSTED.
Step 11 explicitly runs opsx-archive after STATUS=PASS. Guardrails: 'Archive runs exactly once'.

runs.notes: Docker isolation, loop protocol, and auto-archive are all explicitly specified in SKILL.md and protocol reference files.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: Guardrails hard limit: 5 iterations. Container exits STATUS=EXHAUSTED; Step 6.7 Scenario B handles the exhausted path.
Step 15 reads all log files and uses loop-report-template.md which includes a 'Remaining Issues' section from verify output.
5-iteration cap enforced in both container protocol and host monitoring loop — two independent guards.
Step 15 AskUserQuestion 'What would you like to do next?' surfaces the exhausted state; Step 6.7 Scenario B logs a message directing human intervention.

runs.notes: The structured exhaustion path (container exit → result files → Step 15 report) is fully specified. Both container and host layers enforce the cap.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: Step 6.7 Scenario A: container exits with STATUS=PASS; host monitoring loop reads status file on exit.
Step 12: single git commit of all changes, automatic (no AskUserQuestion before commit). Guardrails: 'Single git commit'.
Step 11 runs opsx-archive automatically after verify clean. Not conditional. Guardrails: 'Archive runs exactly once'.
Step 15 final report via loop-report-template.md, then AskUserQuestion 'What would you like to do next?'

runs.notes: Happy path (STATUS=PASS → Step 11 → Step 12 → Step 13 → Step 15) is fully specified and automatic. No user confirmation required between verify-pass and archive.
